overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a futuristic dystopian city. The player character moves from a narrow corridor through an elevated plaza overlooking traffic, traverses a dark building interior, emerges onto a neon-lit street with pedestrians and vehicles, and finally turns into a dark back alley with blue neon lighting.

events.description: exits narrow dark corridor into open elevated plaza with palm trees overlooking the city
emerges from darkness into area with ambient city light and street illumination

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow passage toward an opening with palm trees and city views

tall palm trees in rectangular planters at the plaza overlook

modern metallic public waste bin

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow, dimly lit concrete corridor. As the camera moves forward, it emerges into an elevated outdoor plaza featuring palm trees in planters, modern benches, and a glass railing overlooking the city street below. Tall skyscrapers rise in the distance against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway overlooking busy street

events.description: turns left away from the street overlook toward a building entrance
enters covered building corridor from the open plaza

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated plaza overlooking traffic below, then turning into a building corridor

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated plaza with a glass railing on the right overlooking moving traffic below. The camera passes palm trees and approaches a building entrance with a brightly illuminated wall feature, then turns left into a covered corridor. Futuristic vehicles drive along the wet street visible through the railing.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior building corridor with dramatic lighting feature

events.description: approaches brightly illuminated wall with grid of lights at corridor end
exits building corridor back to outdoor street level

agents.ego_description: walking through a dark interior corridor toward a brightly illuminated exit

smooth dark walls of the interior passage

opening leading back outside to street level

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a dark, enclosed interior corridor with smooth walls. Ahead, a wall of bright rectangular lights creates a dramatic glowing feature. A window on the right offers a glimpse of the street outside. The segment ends as the camera approaches and exits through the illuminated doorway back to the outdoor environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit downtown sidewalk with holographic advertisements

events.description: passes pedestrians walking on the busy neon-lit sidewalk
passing large bright holographic billboards and neon storefront displays

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet city sidewalk past neon signs, storefronts, and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in white jacket walking toward the camera on the sidewalk
person walking in same direction ahead on the sidewalk

tall building with reflective glass facade and illuminated windows

building front with posters and signage at street level

wall covered with colorful street art and posters

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto a wet city sidewalk at street level, the scene is dominated by towering glass buildings and bright neon billboards. The pavement reflects the colorful lights from advertisements and street lamps. Pedestrians walk along the path, and futuristic vehicles pass by on the adjacent road. Overhead walkways connect the tall buildings in this dense urban canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley with industrial elements and blue neon lighting

events.description: turns right from main street into narrow dark alleyway
ambient light shifts to dominant blue neon tube lighting on alley walls

agents.ego_description: turning into and walking through a narrow back alley with industrial debris and neon lighting

long cyan-blue fluorescent light fixture running along the wall
large painted artwork covering the alley wall
large industrial waste container with yellow lid
metal framework and pipes along the alley walls
old car parked in the alley near a doorway
illuminated signage above a doorway at the alley end

segments.scene_description: The camera turns from the busy main street into a narrow, dark alleyway. The environment shifts to an industrial aesthetic with graffiti-covered walls, a yellow dumpster, and metal scaffolding. Blue neon tube lights provide the primary illumination, casting an eerie cyan glow on the wet concrete. A parked vehicle sits near a doorway with green neon lighting at the far end of the alley.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded concrete corridor through a high-tech plaza and into the neon-drenched depths of a dystopian city. It begins in a dimly lit passage before emerging into an elevated outdoor plaza where palm trees and glass railings overlook a stream of futuristic traffic below. As the camera passes a brightly illuminated wall feature, it shifts into a dark, enclosed interior corridor defined by smooth walls and glowing rectangular lights, eventually exiting through a brilliant doorway. The scene then opens onto a wet street-level sidewalk dominated by towering glass buildings and vibrant neon billboards that reflect off the pavement amidst a crowd of pedestrians. Finally, the camera turns away from the urban bustle into a narrow, industrial alleyway where graffiti-covered walls and blue neon tubes cast an eerie cyan glow over wet concrete and parked vehicles.
